prompt: Create a vertical poster in elegant Chinese new aesthetic style, blending ink-wash painting and refined digital illustration on a warm off-white rice-paper background. The composition features a single young ancient Chinese woman seated in profile facing left, calm and scholarly, wearing a soft light gray-white hanfu with subtle floral embroidery and long flowing sleeves. She holds an open stitched book in both hands near her lap. Her hair is styled in a classic updo with a low gathered bun and long dark strands trailing behind, decorated with delicate gold and pearl floral hairpins. The face area should remain unobstructed in the final image, with a serene, graceful expression. Build the scene around a dramatic black-and-gray ink rock formation that wraps behind and beneath her like a seat, with soft smoky watercolor edges and a thin winding metallic gold contour line running from upper right to lower center. Add a blossoming plum branch rising diagonally from the right side with small white flowers and dark bark. Near the lower left, include a small pool ripple with one visible water droplet splash. Scatter a few pale falling petals around the woman’s hands and lower left midground. Keep the palette restrained: ivory, ink black, ash gray, muted taupe, and subtle gold accents. The layout should feel airy and asymmetrical with large blank negative space on the left and top. Add Chinese typography integrated into the poster design: on the upper left, 3 very large vertical characters reading 林黛玉; beneath them, the romanized name in small spaced serif capitals reading "LIN DAIYU"; beside the name, place a slim vertical poem column in Chinese; on the right lower midsection, add another short vertical Chinese text column; at the bottom center, add one small horizontal Chinese sentence. Include exactly 4 red seal stamps placed as traditional accents: 1 near the left poem column, 1 near the lower left by the water ripple, 1 beside the right text column, and 1 small seal-like accent integrated with the typography area. Also include exactly 2 minimalist gold line ornaments in the lower right quadrant. The overall mood is poetic, fragile, pure, melancholic, and literati-inspired, with museum-poster elegance and high-end editorial polish.
